operations.name: abs
operations.notes: Element-wise absolute value; alias for absolute.

operations.name: all
operations.notes: Test whether all array elements are true.

operations.name: amax
operations.notes: Maximum value of array (alias for max/numpy.amax).

operations.name: amin
operations.notes: Minimum value of array (alias for min/numpy.amin).

operations.name: angle
operations.notes: Return angle of complex argument element-wise.

operations.name: any
operations.notes: Test whether any array element is true.

operations.name: append
operations.notes: Append values to end of array.

operations.name: apply_along_axis
operations.notes: Apply function along axis. Not supported.

operations.name: apply_over_axes
operations.notes: Apply function over multiple axes. Not supported.

operations.name: arange
operations.notes: Return evenly spaced values in given interval.

operations.name: argpartition
operations.notes: Indirect partition; cost = n per slice.

operations.name: argsort
operations.notes: Indirect sort; cost = n*ceil(log2(n)) per slice.

operations.name: array2string
operations.notes: Return string representation of array. Not supported.

operations.name: array_repr
operations.notes: Return string representation of array. Not supported.

operations.name: array_str
operations.notes: Return string representation of data in array. Not supported.

operations.name: asarray_chkfinite
operations.notes: Convert to array, raising if NaN or inf.

operations.name: asmatrix
operations.notes: Interpret input as matrix (deprecated). Not supported.

operations.name: atleast_1d
operations.notes: View inputs as arrays with at least one dimension.

operations.name: atleast_2d
operations.notes: View inputs as arrays with at least two dimensions.

operations.name: atleast_3d
operations.notes: View inputs as arrays with at least three dimensions.

operations.name: bartlett
operations.notes: Bartlett window. Cost: n (one linear eval per sample).

operations.name: base_repr
operations.notes: Return string representation of number in given base.

operations.name: binary_repr
operations.notes: Return binary string representation of the input number.

operations.name: blackman
operations.notes: Blackman window. Cost: 3*n (three cosine terms per sample).

operations.name: block
operations.notes: Assemble ndarray from nested list of blocks.

operations.name: bmat
operations.notes: Build matrix from nested list of matrices.

operations.name: broadcast_shapes
operations.notes: Compute broadcast shape from input shapes.

operations.name: busday_count
operations.notes: Count valid days between begindate and enddate. Not supported.

operations.name: busday_offset
operations.notes: Apply offset to dates subject to valid day rules. Not supported.

operations.name: can_cast
operations.notes: Returns True if cast is safe.

operations.name: choose
operations.notes: Construct array from index array and choices.

operations.name: column_stack
operations.notes: Stack 1-D arrays as columns into 2-D array.

operations.name: common_type
operations.notes: Return scalar type common to all input arrays.

operations.name: concat
operations.notes: Join arrays along axis (NumPy 2.x array API alias for concatenate).

operations.name: copysign
operations.notes: Copy sign of x2 to magnitude of x1 element-wise.

operations.name: copyto
operations.notes: Copy values from src to dst array.

operations.name: datetime_as_string
operations.notes: Convert datetime array to string representation. Not supported.

operations.name: datetime_data
operations.notes: Get information about the step size of datetime dtype. Not supported.

operations.name: delete
operations.notes: Return array with sub-arrays deleted along axis.

operations.name: diag
operations.notes: Extract diagonal or construct diagonal array.

operations.name: diag_indices
operations.notes: Return indices to access main diagonal of n-D array.

operations.name: diag_indices_from
operations.notes: Return indices to access main diagonal of given array.

operations.name: diagflat
operations.notes: Create diagonal array from flattened input.

operations.name: dot
operations.notes: Dot product; cost = M*N*K for matrix multiply (FMA=1).

operations.name: dsplit
operations.notes: Split array into multiple sub-arrays depth-wise.

operations.name: einsum_path
operations.notes: Optimize einsum contraction path (no numeric output).

operations.name: empty_like
operations.notes: Uninitialized array with same shape/type as input.

operations.name: fft.fft
operations.notes: 1-D complex FFT. Cost: 5*n*ceil(log2(n)) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fft.fft2
operations.notes: 2-D complex FFT. Cost: 5*N*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fft.fftfreq
operations.notes: FFT sample frequencies. No arithmetic; returns index array.

operations.name: fft.fftn
operations.notes: N-D complex FFT. Cost: 5*N*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fft.fftshift
operations.notes: Shift zero-frequency component to center. No arithmetic; index reordering only.

operations.name: fft.hfft
operations.notes: FFT of Hermitian-symmetric signal. Cost: 5*n_out*ceil(log2(n_out)) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fft.ifft
operations.notes: Inverse 1-D complex FFT. Cost: 5*n*ceil(log2(n)) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fft.ifft2
operations.notes: Inverse 2-D complex FFT. Cost: 5*N*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fft.ifftn
operations.notes: Inverse N-D complex FFT. Cost: 5*N*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fft.ifftshift
operations.notes: Inverse of fftshift. No arithmetic; index reordering only.

operations.name: fft.ihfft
operations.notes: Inverse FFT of Hermitian signal. Cost: 5*n*ceil(log2(n)) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fft.irfft
operations.notes: Inverse 1-D real FFT. Cost: 5*(n//2)*ceil(log2(n)) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fft.irfft2
operations.notes: Inverse 2-D real FFT. Cost: 5*(N//2)*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fft.irfftn
operations.notes: Inverse N-D real FFT. Cost: 5*(N//2)*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fft.rfft
operations.notes: 1-D real FFT. Cost: 5*(n//2)*ceil(log2(n)) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fft.rfft2
operations.notes: 2-D real FFT. Cost: 5*(N//2)*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fft.rfftfreq
operations.notes: Real FFT sample frequencies. No arithmetic; returns index array.

operations.name: fft.rfftn
operations.notes: N-D real FFT. Cost: 5*(N//2)*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

operations.name: fill_diagonal
operations.notes: Fill main diagonal of given array.

operations.name: fix
operations.notes: Round toward zero element-wise (alias for trunc).

operations.name: flatnonzero
operations.notes: Return indices of non-zero elements in flattened array.

operations.name: flip
operations.notes: Reverse order of elements along axis.

operations.name: format_float_positional
operations.notes: Format floating point scalar as decimal string. Not supported.

operations.name: format_float_scientific
operations.notes: Format floating point scalar as scientific notation. Not supported.

operations.name: frexp
operations.notes: Decompose x into mantissa and exponent element-wise.

operations.name: fromfunction
operations.notes: Construct array by executing function over each coordinate.

operations.name: frompyfunc
operations.notes: Take arbitrary Python function and return NumPy ufunc. Not supported.

operations.name: fromregex
operations.notes: Construct array from text file using regex.

operations.name: full
operations.notes: Create array filled with scalar value.

operations.name: full_like
operations.notes: Array filled with scalar, same shape/type as input.

operations.name: genfromtxt
operations.notes: Load data from text file with missing values. Not supported.

operations.name: get_include
operations.notes: Return directory containing NumPy C header files. Not supported.

operations.name: getbufsize
operations.notes: Return size of buffer used in ufuncs. Not supported.

operations.name: geterr
operations.notes: Get current way of handling floating-point errors. Not supported.

operations.name: geterrcall
operations.notes: Return current callback function for floating-point errors. Not supported.

operations.name: hamming
operations.notes: Hamming window. Cost: n (one cosine per sample).

operations.name: hanning
operations.notes: Hanning window. Cost: n (one cosine per sample).

operations.name: i0
operations.notes: Modified Bessel function of order 0, element-wise.

operations.name: imag
operations.notes: Return imaginary part of complex array.

operations.name: indices
operations.notes: Return array representing indices of a grid.

operations.name: inner
operations.notes: Inner product; cost = N for 1-D, N*M for n-D.

operations.name: insert
operations.notes: Insert values along axis before given indices.

operations.name: is_busday
operations.notes: Calculates which of given dates are valid days. Not supported.

operations.name: iscomplex
operations.notes: Test if element is complex element-wise.

operations.name: iscomplexobj
operations.notes: Return True if input is a complex type or array.

operations.name: isdtype
operations.notes: Return True if array or dtype is of specified kind (NumPy 2.x).

operations.name: isfortran
operations.notes: Return True if array is Fortran contiguous.

operations.name: isreal
operations.notes: Test if element is real (imag == 0) element-wise.

operations.name: isrealobj
operations.notes: Return True if x is a not complex type or array.

operations.name: isscalar
operations.notes: Return True if input is a scalar.

operations.name: issubdtype
operations.notes: Return True if first argument is lower in type hierarchy.

operations.name: iterable
operations.notes: Return True if object is iterable.

operations.name: ix_
operations.notes: Construct open mesh from multiple sequences.

operations.name: kaiser
operations.notes: Kaiser window. Cost: 3*n (Bessel function eval per sample).

operations.name: kron
operations.notes: Kronecker product; cost proportional to output size.

operations.name: linalg.diagonal
operations.notes: View of diagonal — delegates to mechestim.diagonal. Cost: 0 FLOPs.

operations.name: linalg.eig
operations.notes: Eigendecomposition. Cost: $10n^3$ (Francis QR, Golub & Van Loan §7.5).

operations.name: linalg.matrix_norm
operations.notes: Matrix norm. Cost depends on ord: numel for Frobenius, m*n*min(m,n) for ord=2.

operations.name: linalg.matrix_power
operations.notes: Matrix power. Cost: $(\lfloor\log_2 k\rfloor + \text{popcount}(k) - 1) \cdot n^3$ (exponentiation by squaring).

operations.name: linalg.matrix_transpose
operations.notes: Transpose view — delegates to mechestim.matrix_transpose. Cost: 0 FLOPs.

operations.name: linalg.multi_dot
operations.notes: Chain matmul. Cost: sum of optimal chain matmul costs (CLRS §15.2).

operations.name: linalg.norm
operations.notes: Norm. Cost depends on ord: numel for L1/inf, numel for Frobenius, m*n*min(m,n) for ord=2.

operations.name: linalg.qr
operations.notes: QR decomposition. Cost: $mn^2 - n^3/3$ (Golub & Van Loan §5.2, FMA=1).

operations.name: linalg.tensordot
operations.notes: Delegates to `me.tensordot` which charges FLOPs based on contraction.

operations.name: linalg.tensorinv
operations.notes: Tensor inverse. Cost: $n^3$ after reshape (delegates to inv).

operations.name: linalg.tensorsolve
operations.notes: Tensor solve. Cost: $n^3$ after reshape (delegates to solve).

operations.name: linalg.trace
operations.notes: Matrix trace. Cost: n (sum of diagonal elements).

operations.name: linalg.vector_norm
operations.notes: Vector norm. Cost: numel (or numel for general p-norm).

operations.name: linspace
operations.notes: Return evenly spaced numbers over interval.

operations.name: load
operations.notes: Load arrays from .npy/.npz files. Not supported.

operations.name: loadtxt
operations.notes: Load data from text file. Not supported.

operations.name: mask_indices
operations.notes: Return indices of mask for n x n array.

operations.name: matrix_transpose
operations.notes: Transpose last two dimensions (NumPy 2.x array API).

operations.name: may_share_memory
operations.notes: Determine if two arrays might share memory.

operations.name: min_scalar_type
operations.notes: Return the minimum scalar type for a value.

operations.name: mintypecode
operations.notes: Return minimum data type character that can satisfy all given types.

operations.name: modf
operations.notes: Return fractional and integral parts element-wise.

operations.name: nan_to_num
operations.notes: Replace NaN/inf with finite numbers element-wise.

operations.name: ndim
operations.notes: Return number of dimensions of array.

operations.name: nested_iters
operations.notes: Create nested iterators for multi-index broadcasting. Not supported.

operations.name: nextafter
operations.notes: Return next float after x1 toward x2 element-wise.

operations.name: ones_like
operations.notes: Array of ones with same shape/type as input.

operations.name: outer
operations.notes: Outer product of two vectors; cost = M*N.

operations.name: packbits
operations.notes: Pack elements of array into bits.

operations.name: polyadd
operations.notes: Add two polynomials. Cost: max(n1, n2) FLOPs.

operations.name: polydiv
operations.notes: Divide one polynomial by another. Cost: n1 * n2 FLOPs.

operations.name: polyfit
operations.notes: Least squares polynomial fit. Cost: m * (deg+1)^2 FLOPs.

operations.name: polymul
operations.notes: Multiply polynomials. Cost: n1 * n2 FLOPs.

operations.name: polysub
operations.notes: Difference (subtraction) of two polynomials. Cost: max(n1, n2) FLOPs.

operations.name: polyval
operations.notes: Evaluate polynomial at given points. Cost: m * deg FLOPs (Horner's method).

operations.name: positive
operations.notes: Element-wise unary plus (copy with sign preserved).

operations.name: promote_types
operations.notes: Return smallest type to which both types may be safely cast.

operations.name: put
operations.notes: Replace elements at given flat indices.

operations.name: put_along_axis
operations.notes: Put values into destination array using indices.

operations.name: putmask
operations.notes: Change elements of array based on condition and input values.

operations.name: random.choice
operations.notes: Sampling; cost = numel(output) if replace, n*ceil(log2(n)) if not.

operations.name: random.default_rng
operations.notes: Construct a new Generator with default BitGenerator.

operations.name: random.get_state
operations.notes: Return tuple representing internal state of generator.

operations.name: ravel_multi_index
operations.notes: Convert multi-dimensional index to flat index.

operations.name: real
operations.notes: Return real part of complex array.

operations.name: real_if_close
operations.notes: Return real array if imaginary part is negligible.

operations.name: resize
operations.notes: Return new array with given shape by repeating.

operations.name: result_type
operations.notes: Return type that results from applying NumPy type promotion.

operations.name: roots
operations.notes: Return roots of polynomial with given coefficients. Cost: $10n^3$ FLOPs (companion matrix eig).

operations.name: round
operations.notes: Round to given number of decimals element-wise.

operations.name: save
operations.notes: Save array to .npy file. Not supported.

operations.name: savetxt
operations.notes: Save array to text file. Not supported.

operations.name: savez
operations.notes: Save multiple arrays to .npz file. Not supported.

operations.name: savez_compressed
operations.notes: Save multiple arrays to compressed .npz file. Not supported.

operations.name: select
operations.notes: Return array from list of choices based on conditions.

operations.name: setbufsize
operations.notes: Set size of buffer used in ufuncs. Not supported.

operations.name: seterr
operations.notes: Set how floating-point errors are handled. Not supported.

operations.name: seterrcall
operations.notes: Set callback function for floating-point errors. Not supported.

operations.name: shares_memory
operations.notes: Determine if two arrays share memory.

operations.name: show_config
operations.notes: Show NumPy build configuration. Not supported.

operations.name: signbit
operations.notes: Returns True for elements with negative sign bit.

operations.name: size
operations.notes: Return number of elements in array.

operations.name: sort
operations.notes: Comparison sort; cost = n*ceil(log2(n)) per slice.

operations.name: sort_complex
operations.notes: Sort complex array by real then imaginary part.

operations.name: spacing
operations.notes: Return ULP spacing for each element.

operations.name: swapaxes
operations.notes: Interchange two axes of an array.

operations.name: take
operations.notes: Take elements from array along axis.

operations.name: take_along_axis
operations.notes: Take values from input array by matching 1-D index.

operations.name: tensordot
operations.cost_formula: product of contracted dims * output size
operations.notes: Tensor dot product along specified axes.

operations.name: tri
operations.notes: Array with ones at and below given diagonal.

operations.name: tril_indices
operations.notes: Return lower-triangle indices for n x n array.

operations.name: tril_indices_from
operations.notes: Return lower-triangle indices for given array.

operations.name: triu_indices
operations.notes: Return upper-triangle indices for n x n array.

operations.name: triu_indices_from
operations.notes: Return upper-triangle indices for given array.

operations.name: typename
operations.notes: Return description of given data type code.

operations.name: unpackbits
operations.notes: Unpack elements of array into bits.

operations.name: unravel_index
operations.notes: Convert flat index to multi-dimensional index.

operations.name: unstack
operations.notes: Unstack array along axis into tuple of arrays (NumPy 2.x).

operations.name: vdot
operations.notes: Dot product with conjugation; cost = N.

operations.name: vecdot
operations.notes: Vector dot product along last axis.

operations.name: zeros_like
operations.notes: Array of zeros with same shape/type as input.
